mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_menu (menu_id, tenant_id, menu_nm, menu_url, menu_icon, sort_order, parent_menu_id, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{tenantId}, #{menuNm}, #{menuUrl}, #{menuIcon}, #{sortOrder}, #{parentMenuId}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_menu SET menu_nm = #{menuNm}, menu_url = #{menuUrl}, menu_icon = #{menuIcon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, parent_menu_id = #{parentMenuId}, use_yn = #{useYn}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
